title: Miconia impetiolaris
taxonomy: Miconia impetiolaris is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the "membrane-fruited plants" or "melastomes". Miconia impetiolaris is further classified as a member of the genus Miconia, which is a large and diverse group of plants found in tropical and subtropical regions. The genus Miconia is native to the Americas, with many species found in Central and South America. As a member of the family Melastomataceae, Miconia impetiolaris is closely related to other melastome species.
